title: Whats the purpous of Pen Pens backpack thingie
display_title: Whats the purpous of Pen Pens backpack thingie
wikitext:
[]: What's the purpous of Pen-Pen's backpack thingie?             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Aug 15, 2006 2:52 am Ever since I first saw NGE, I never understood what that thing is for. Maybe it's some kind of experimental jet pack that he only uses when no-one is looking. Really though, what's that thing for? I can't even remember if we ever saw him without it. Maybe he's actually a robot, and that thing is where the batteries are stored. :o

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 15, 2006 3:10 am im sure if thats this is the right section for that....im pretty sure its just to give him a human quality...which is pimp when you do it to a penguin...so......yeah

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:27 am It's been suggested that the pack is actually a cooling device. But I have no official proof to back that up. That makes the most logical sense.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:29 am How come a penguin that likes hot bath needs a cooling device?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:38 am Because that's how you make a warm water penguin. Normal Penguin + Cooling Backpack = Warm Water Penguin

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Aug 15, 2006 9:17 am But Pen-Pen seemed to be so happy when he got to the pool... :) Maybe thats where he is keeping some "emergency" food. Or maybe its some kind of life support thingee; he is a clone or whatever after all... Or maybe he has that instead of a simple belt. Maybe it has a GPS. Perhaps its just for the looks. Dunno. He looks good in it, thats all that matters for me.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Aug 15, 2006 9:55 am Since Pen-pen lives in a refrigerator, I think it's safe to assume that the backpack keeps him cool while out and about. Either that or it's the communications device he uses to control SEELE...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 15, 2006 10:34 am drinian wrote: Either that or it's the communications device he uses to control SEELE...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Aug 15, 2006 11:16 am It's his turbo booster for when he gets chased by any walruses/angels

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Aug 15, 2006 11:41 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Ah yes, the old "Pen Pen is God" theory/joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Aug 15, 2006 12:29 pm drinian wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Ah yes, the old "Pen Pen is God" theory/joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Aug 15, 2006 2:31 pm Space Penis wrote: drinian wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Ah yes, the old "Pen Pen is God" theory/joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Tue Aug 15, 2006 3:38 pm I'm seriosuly thinking that one of the potential story boards for the final slew of angels could have involved Pen-Pen being the 17 instead of K-man. The backpac would actually be an MP3 player that would play Ode to Joy.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 15, 2006 7:41 pm It's full of beer.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 15, 2006 7:57 pm Reichu posted this picture over at ANF, then I saw this thread, then... WHAT COULD IT MEAN?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:15 pm Ornette wrote: WHAT COULD IT MEAN?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:44 pm Maybe he's a cyborg penguin. Maybe this new animation will be PiTS: Penguin in the Shell.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Tue Aug 15, 2006 8:50 pm It's where he stores his guns. And beer. And drugs. And porno.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Aug 15, 2006 9:24 pm l just remembed that in Girlfriend of Steel, he took it off at the hotsprings. Did he in the Anime, too? I can't recall...

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Aug 15, 2006 10:43 pm What'd make a fun fanfic is if it turned out penpen was the 19th angel and Shinji and Asuka had to fight him alone on top of Reis big giant head!
